Nuclear tit-for-tat now explicit. Updated 2026-03-22T18:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). Trump ultimatum ~28hrs to deadline (~23:44 GMT Mon). IRGC: Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants hit + retaliation on ALL regional infrastructure. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' + Kharg Island 'could become American asset.' 2,500 more marines + 3 amphibious ships deploying. 2,000+ dead region-wide. Updated 2026-03-22T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran TODAY
latest_news.source: Gulf News / UAE Ministry of Defence
latest_news.text: UAE air defence intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones from Iran today. Cumulative since war start: 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1,773 UAVs intercepted. 2 UAE military + 6 foreign nationals killed, 160 injured.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts ~60 Iranian drones, 3 ballistic missiles toward Riyadh
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia intercepted nearly 60 Iranian drones targeting Eastern Province energy facilities. 3 ballistic missiles launched toward Riyadh - 1 intercepted, 2 fell in uninhabited areas. Saudi also expelled Iranian military attache + staff.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,500, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Iran state broadcaster confirms 1,500+ killed, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli attacks. 7 hospitals evacuated, 36 ambulances damaged.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran - geographic expansion of attacks
latest_news.text: Israel launched new attacks on Tehran on Sunday, explosions reported in the east of the city - further geographic expansion of strikes beyond oil depot/refinery strikes.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 68% (stable). Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). IDF destroys Qasmiya bridge near Tyre - Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Army chief Zamir: 'War not close to ending' + troops will remain in Lebanon for months. Litani bridge strikes cut evacuation routes. 200+ targets hit this weekend across Lebanon+Iran. Updated 2026-03-22T18:05:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began. No new Turkey-specific escalation. Updated 2026-03-22T18:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 28% (up). Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. ELEVATED (up). CEASEFIRE BREACHES MOUNTING: Multiple mortar attacks in Kunar/Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 killed. Taliban calls Pakistan 'deceptive.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely.' TTP ceasefire also active but separate from Taliban. Ceasefire through Mar 24 but fraying badly. Post-Eid resumption of full hostilities feared. Updated 2026-03-22T18:05:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

IRGC: Hormuz 'completely closed until rebuilt' + will strike ALL regional power plants + companies with US shareholders
ISRAEL DESTROYS LITANI BRIDGE: Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion'
Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' — Kharg Island 'could become American asset'
PAKISTAN CEASEFIRE BREACHES: Mortar fire Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed — ICG warns 'deadly violence'
Netanyahu at Dimona crater: Army chief 'war not close to ending'
ISW: Russian mechanized assaults intensifying — spring-summer 2026 offensive prep
2,000+ dead across region, WHO warns war at 'perilous stage'
IDF: troops will remain in Lebanon for months — open-ended occupation

new: Pakistan ceasefire breached: mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika during Eid, 1 civilian killed
Bessent: US may occupy Kharg Island — 'could become American asset'
2,500 additional marines + 3 amphibious assault ships deploying
IRGC explicitly threatens Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants struck
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire technically through Mar 24 but breached (mortar fire Kunar/Paktika). IAEA confirms no radiation at Dimona/Natanz. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~28hrs. IRGC threatens 'complete' Hormuz closure + retaliation on ALL regional infrastructure. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' + Kharg Island occupation possible. 2,500 more marines deploying. 2,000+ dead. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Pakistan ceasefire fraying — post-Eid violence feared.

latest_news.headline: Iran: Hormuz 'completely closed until power plants rebuilt' + will strike ALL regional power plants
latest_news.text: Iran military formal statement: Hormuz 'completely closed' and 'not reopened until destroyed power plants rebuilt.' Will also strike Israel's power plants, energy/ICT infrastructure, AND power plants in regional countries hosting US bases AND companies with US shareholders.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya bridge near Tyre - Lebanese president: 'prelude to ground invasion'
latest_news.text: IDF destroys Qasmiya bridge over Litani River near Tyre - key transit route connecting south Lebanon. Lebanon President Aoun calls strikes 'unjustified' and 'prelude to ground invasion.' Evacuation routes cut.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan Eid ceasefire fraying: Multiple breach reports, 1 killed in Kunar
latest_news.text: Multiple ceasefire breach reports from Kunar/Paktika. 1 civilian killed by Pakistani mortar fire. Taliban chief of staff accuses Pakistan of 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire through Mar 24 but deteriorating.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu visits Dimona crater, Iran strikes Arad - 64 hospitalized
latest_news.text: Netanyahu visits Dimona impact crater with mayor. Arad strike: 64 hospitalized, 10+ buildings damaged, 3 near collapse. First Iranian missiles to penetrate air defenses in Dimona nuclear area. IAEA: no radiation detected. Army chief Zamir: 'war not close to ending.'

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 17:00 UTC). Trump ultimatum ~30hrs to deadline. Iran defiant: Hormuz "completely closed" + threatens desalination/energy strikes. IDF 200+ targets weekend (Lebanon+Iran). IRGC spokesman killed. Natanz struck. Dimona/Arad hit (180+ injured). 2,000+ dead. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline with reciprocal infrastructure threats on both sides.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 17 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA no radiation at Natanz/Dimona. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~30hrs. Iran threatens desalination plants (Middle East water lifeline). IDF 200+ targets weekend. 2,000+ dead. Natanz nuclear complex struck. Hormuz still largely closed. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Both sides threatening civilian infrastructure — water, energy, power.

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
No immediate nuclear threshold events anticipated. Status quo enrichment posture likely maintained.
